The Perfect Crime Notable now has 30% less Damage with Triggered Spells (previously 35%).
The Calculated Risk Notable now has Damage of Enemies Hitting you is Unlucky.
The Assassin Notable now provides Damage Cannot be Reflected (previously Damage from your Critical Strikes cannot be Reflected).

skill_changes.skill: The Prolonged Servitude Bloodline Passive Skill
skill_changes.raw: The Prolonged Servitude Bloodline Passive Skill now has Minions deal 20% more Damage while they are on low Life (previously 15%).

skill_changes.skill: The Misty Reflection Skill granted by the It wasn't me! Bloodline Passive Skill
skill_changes.raw: The Misty Reflection Skill granted by the It wasn't me! Bloodline Passive Skill now has a base Duration of 3 seconds (previously 2), and now has 5% of your maximum Life (previously 10%).

skill_changes.skill: The Primal Roar Bloodline Passive Skill
skill_changes.raw: The Primal Roar Bloodline Passive Skill now provides 4% increased Attack Speed per Minion, up to a maximum of 80% (previously 2% per Minion).

skill_changes.skill: The Unlight Silhouette Bloodline Passive Skill
skill_changes.raw: The Unlight Silhouette Bloodline Passive Skill now has Skills gain Added Chaos Damage equal to 25% of Life Cost, if Life Cost is not higher than the maximum you could spend (previously 20%).

skill_changes.skill: The Boon of the Mountain Bloodline Passive Skill
skill_changes.raw: The Boon of the Mountain Bloodline Passive Skill now grants 50% less Damage Taken from Damage over Time while you have Unbroken Ward (previously 30%).

skill_changes.skill: The Boon of the Sun Bloodline Passive Skill
skill_changes.raw: The Boon of the Sun Bloodline Passive Skill now grants 30% faster Restoration of Ward per Enemy Hit taken Recently (previously 20%).

skill_changes.skill: The Enhanced Starlight Bloodline Passive Skill
skill_changes.raw: The Enhanced Starlight Bloodline Passive Skill now grants 70% increased Ward from Equipped Armour Items (previously 40%).

skill_changes.skill: Ward Shatter triggered by the Volatile Runes Bloodline Passive Skill
skill_changes.raw: Ward Shatter triggered by the Volatile Runes Bloodline Passive Skill now has 200% more Damage if Ward has not broken in the past 2 seconds (previously 80%). It now deals 160% to 240% of Ward as Base Spell Physical Damage (previously 250% to 300%), and has a Cooldown of 0.15 seconds (previously 0.5). Ward Shatter can no longer apply the Enervation Debuff to player characters.

skill_changes.skill: The Vivid Cat Bloodline Passive Skill
skill_changes.raw: The Vivid Cat Bloodline Passive Skill now provides 50% increased effect of Marks while you have Elusive, instead of 50% increased Stealth while Elusive.

skill_changes.skill: Added two new clusters to the west of the Templar starting area
skill_changes.raw: Added two new clusters to the west of the Templar starting area: one granting Accuracy and Effect of Consecrated Ground, the other granting Accuracy and Attack Area of Effect.

skill_changes.skill: The Evasion and Energy Shield Mastery
skill_changes.raw: The Evasion and Energy Shield Mastery now has 1% increased Evasion Rating per 10 Intelligence (previously per 5 Intelligence).

Bino's Kitchen Knife Unique Dagger now has on Killing a Poisoned Enemy, Enemies within 3 metres are Poisoned (previously 1.5 metres) and nearby Allies Regenerate 400 Life per second (previously 200 Life per second). Existing items are affected by this change.
The Bloodnotch Unique Jewel now has 20-30% of Damage taken from Stunning Hits is Recovered as Life (previously 40-60%). Existing items can be made worse with a Divine Orb.
The Bloodseeker Unique Claw now has 200-250% increased Physical Damage (previously 200-220%). Existing items can be updated to the new values with a Divine Orb.

skill_changes.skill: Bloodseeker Unique Claw no longer has 5% increased Attack Speed or 5% increased Movement Speed. Bloodseeker
skill_changes.raw: Bloodseeker Unique Claw no longer has 5% increased Attack Speed or 5% increased Movement Speed. Bloodseeker now has 15-25% increased Life Reservation Efficiency of Skills and 5-10% increased maximum Recovery per Life Leech for each 5% of Life Reserved. These changes do not affect existing items.

Essentia Sanguis Unique Claw now has Adds 1 to 650-850 Lightning Damage (previously 600-700) and +200-300 to maximum Energy Shield (previously 30 to 40). A Divine Orb can update these modifiers to the new values.

skill_changes.skill: Essentia Sanguis no longer has +8% Chance to Block Attack Damage while Dual Wielding Claws and
skill_changes.raw: Essentia Sanguis no longer has +8% Chance to Block Attack Damage while Dual Wielding Claws and now has Maximum Recovery per Energy Shield Leech is Doubled. The implicit modifier is now 2% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life (from 2% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Life). These changes do not affect existing versions of the unique item.
Hand of Heresy Unique Gloves now has Melee Attacks have +0.8-1.6% to Critical Strike Chance against Excommunicated Enemies. Existing versions of this item are unaffected by this change.
The Marohi Erqi Unique Mace now has 40-50% increased Area of Effect. This change does not affect existing versions of the item.

Lioneye's Glare Unique Bow now has Attacks you use yourself Repeat an additional time and Attacks you use yourself have 50% more Attack Speed. The implicit modifier is now 20-24% increased Global Physical Damage (previously 20-24% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills). It no longer has 10-20% increased Attack Speed. These changes do not affect existing versions of the item.

skill_changes.skill: The Pledge of Hands Unique Staff
skill_changes.raw: The Pledge of Hands Unique Staff now has Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 1 Greater Spell Echo (previously level 30). This change affects existing versions of the item. This staff now also has 50-100% increased maximum Mana (previously 50%), and existing items can be updated to these new values using a Divine Orb.

The Sibyl's Lament Unique Ring now grants 100% of Elemental Hit Damage from you and your Minions cannot be Reflected in the Left Ring Slot (previously 80%), and 100% of Physical Hit Damage from you and your Minions cannot be Reflected in the Right Ring Slot (previously 80%) Existing items can be updated to the new values with a Divine Orb.
Soul Taker Unique Axe now has Eat 2-4 Souls when you Kill a Rare or Unique Enemy with this Weapon. Existing versions of this item are unaffected by this change.

skill_changes.skill: The Supreme Truth Unique Sceptre no longer grants 20% increased Elemental Damage, and instead
skill_changes.raw: The Supreme Truth Unique Sceptre no longer grants 20% increased Elemental Damage, and instead now grants Attacks with this Weapon inflict Hallowing Flame on Hit.

Voltaxic Rift Unique Bow now has Treats Enemy Monster Chaos Resistance values as inverted and no longer has Hits with this Weapon Shock Enemies as though dealing 300% more Damage. Existing versions of this item are unaffected by this change.

The Woespike Unique Ring now has 40-50% less Impale Duration (previously 25-40% reduced Impale Duration), and 20-30% chance on Melee Hit for the Strongest Impale on target to last for 1 additional Hit (from 45-60%). Woespike now drops from the Uber Incarnation of Fear.
Essence of Insanity on Rings now grants 60% of Hit Damage from you and your Minions cannot be Reflected (previously 40%).

skill_changes.skill: The Primordial Bond Cluster Jewel Notable
skill_changes.raw: The Primordial Bond Cluster Jewel Notable now has 20% increased Effect of Buffs granted by your Golems (previously 40%).

skill_changes.skill: Small Attack Block Cluster Jewels can now roll the the new Notable
skill_changes.raw: Small Attack Block Cluster Jewels can now roll the the new Notable: Fiery Aegis.

skill_changes.skill: Medium Exerted Attack Cluster Jewels can now roll the new Notable
skill_changes.raw: Medium Exerted Attack Cluster Jewels can now roll the new Notable: Holy Word.

skill_changes.skill: Runegraft of Refraction no longer has Skills chain an additional time, and
skill_changes.raw: Runegraft of Refraction no longer has Skills chain an additional time, and now has Projectiles chain an additional time.

skill_changes.skill: The Follow-Through Notable Cluster Jewel Passive
skill_changes.raw: The Follow-Through Notable Cluster Jewel Passive now grants Projectiles deal 20% increased Damage with Hits and Ailments for each remaining Chain, up to 100% (previously 15% increased with no cap)
The Quickstep skill now has 200% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate if used while no Enemies are in your Presence.

skill_changes.skill: The following Divination Cards have been temporarily disabled
skill_changes.raw: The following Divination Cards have been temporarily disabled: The Bargain, The Obscured, and The Puzzle. Existing Divination Cards cannot be turned in currently.
Replenishing Shrine Buff now grants 200% increased Mana Regeneration Rate (instead of Regenerate 10% of Mana per second).
Lesser Replenishing Shrine Buff now grants 100% increased Mana Regeneration Rate (instead of Regenerate 3.33% of Mana per second).
Vaal Breach: cannot be obtained, and is temporarily disabled from being used for existing copies of the Gem. It will be re-enabled with new Breach effects and monsters in a future patch.
Elemental Hit: The Cryogenesis notable on the Breachlord Bloodline now additionally states Elemental Hit's Added Damage cannot be replaced this way.

Viper Strike of the Mamba now has 30% less Attack Speed while Dual Wielding and 20% less Damage with Hits while Dual Wielding (matching regular Viper Strike). This modifier now explicitly states that it only applies to Damage with Hits rather than being ambiguous.

skill_changes.skill: The Low Tolerance Cluster Jewel Notable
skill_changes.raw: The Low Tolerance Cluster Jewel Notable now has Poisons you inflict on non-Poisoned Enemies deal 200% increased Damage (previously 300%).

skill_changes.skill: The Follow-Through Notable Cluster Jewel Passive
skill_changes.raw: The Follow-Through Notable Cluster Jewel Passive now grants Projectiles deal 20% increased Damage with Hits and Ailments for each remaining Chain, up to 100% (previously 15% increased with no cap)

skill_changes.skill: We really hope you enjoy Path of Exile
skill_changes.raw: We really hope you enjoy Path of Exile: Mirage. Thanks for your
